ui.title: PhotoVerify
ui.tagline: Universal Sovereignty: Stamp, Deed, & Forensic DNA

welcome.title: Secure Your Vision
welcome.desc: PhotoVerify provides a multi-layered forensic evidence kit to prove image ownership. All processing happens 100% on your device.

about.title: Strategic & Competitive Analysis
about.summary: In the age of generative AI and digital reproduction, originality is under siege. PhotoVerify shifts the paradigm to Sovereign Forensic Proof—empowering creators with local-first evidence through digital signatures and the Physical Border Stamp.
about.comparison: Unlike Adobe's fragile metadata or Microsoft's reactive filtering, PhotoVerify provides proactive, pixel-rooted geometric certainty.

pages.title: Digital Sovereignty
pages.content: In the digital age, the 'Chicken & Egg' problem of image ownership is pervasive. PhotoVerify solves this through Local Sovereignty across three layers: Digital (Stamp), Forensic (DNA), and Physical (Border Stamp). By generating mathematical and physical proof locally, the creator retains absolute control without relying on third-party cloud trust.

pages.title: Digital Fingerprinting (SHA-256)
pages.content: SHA-256 produces a unique signature for every file. This serves as the first layer of your Triple-Lock evidence, providing a 'Binary Witness' to the original state of your pixels. Your master file's SHA-256 hash is essential to prove that derived copies originated from your source.

pages.title: Visual DNA (aHash)
pages.content: Unlike cryptographic hashes, Perceptual Hashes are stable against minor visual changes. PhotoVerify uses Average Hash (aHash) logic: it downscales the image to a 16x16 grid, removes color, and generates a 256-bit bitmask. This identifies content, not bytes.

pages.title: The Mathematics of the 256-Bit DNA
pages.content: We use Hamming Distance to compare DNA samples. The match probability follows a Binomial Distribution. In a 256-bit space, a match of >75% is statistically impossible by accident (p < 10^-9), proving a shared origin beyond reasonable doubt.

pages.title: Blue Channel Steganography
pages.content: PhotoVerify's 'Invisible Stamp' exploits the HVS. Humans have far fewer short-wavelength (Blue) cones than long-wavelength cones. We modulate the Blue channel by ±18 units, which is detectable by sensors but invisible to the naked eye.

pages.title: Trusted Timestamping
pages.content: By hashing 'Image_Hash + Bitcoin_Block_Hash', we create an immutable record. Since the Bitcoin hash was only known after its block was mined, this proves the image existed in your possession at that exact window in time.

pages.title: Quantization Error Analysis
pages.content: By analyzing Histogram Gaps (comb artifacts), our Auditor can determine if an image is a high-quality original or a degraded copy. The file with fewer 'gaps' is forensicsically recognized as the earlier version.

pages.title: Elastic Alignment
pages.content: Cropping shifts grid alignment. Our Elastic Anchor performs a sliding-window brute-force search across X/Y offsets to re-align the DNA raster, ensuring validity even after heavy tampering.

pages.title: The 1-Pixel Physical Border
pages.content: The Border Stamp provides a geometric proof of possession. By extracting the outermost 1-pixel rectangle, you create a unique puzzle piece. Only the individual who possesses both the Border and the exact original dimensions can reconstruct the image.

pages.title: Legal Validity
pages.content: Our reports are designed to meet the 'Substantial Similarity' test used in global copyright jurisdictions. We offer objective, mathematical evidence beyond subjective visual comparison.
